# Skills

This repository includes the workshop design skills:

- [enterprise-ui-designer/SKILL.md](enterprise-ui-designer/SKILL.md)
- [zava-designer/SKILL.md](zava-designer/SKILL.md)

The workshop should use `zava-designer` as the primary Block 4 skill.

The workshop assumes the chosen skill has already been installed and is available to participants from the start of the session.
